title: HTML and RESTful APIs Quiz
description: Test your knowledge of the essential HTTP methods and patterns for connecting your HTML front-end to a back-end database.

questions.question: What is the primary purpose of a 'RESTful API' (REpresentational State Transfer) in a web application?
options: To make the website load much faster.
To provide a standard way to retrieve and store data (like user profiles or product lists) on a database from your HTML front-end.
To define the website's visual styles and animations.
To help users write HTML code more quickly.

questions.question: Which HTTP method is specifically used to retrieve data from a server?
Which HTTP method is specifically used to send NEW data (like a new user registration) to a database?
What is the most common data format sent between an HTML application and a RESTful API?
What does 'CORS' (Cross-Origin Resource Sharing) primarily protect your web application from?
options: Malicious requests that try to access your API data from a different, unauthorized domain.
